subcodes.first_line: O thou who findest thy wealth in aught save God! The riches of gold and silver shall but multiply thy needs and serve as a cause of distraction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای غنی از ماسوی الله غناء ذهب و فضه سبب کثرت احتیاج گردد و علت انشغال شود
subcodes.subjects: @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
